home.title: Enterprise Security Risk Assessment
home.lead: Identify and analyze security risks with tenant isolation and GB/T 20984–oriented workflows. Keep assessment history, link assets/threats/vulnerabilities/controls, and use the Agent for analysis and recommendations.
home.features: Maintain assets, threats, vulnerabilities, and security measures|Assessment records, factor linking, and L×I risk levels|Dashboard and recent assessment activity|Agent chat bound to assessment chatId
